name: Teamphon Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Teamphon Energy Co., Ltd. operates as a professional consumer electronic IC application design company in Taiwan. It offers Wi-Fi cam solutions, baby monitors, and products for consumer applications, as well as supplies electronic components. The company also provides various products for game applications consisting of fit life, TV game, and gogo TV; and multimedia applications comprising car black box, mobile media player, MP3 player, TV box, PMP/learning aids, and boombox. It also markets its products in the United States, Japan, Europe, Mainland China, etc. Teamphon Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
